name: ddpm-mnist
license_evidence: HF API cardData.license=mit; README.md frontmatter 'license: mit'; tag 'license:mit'. No standalone LICENSE file in repo, but explicit license field is definitive.
quant: int8 (per-tensor symmetric) primary; int4 (group=64, 1-D params kept int8) alt
roundtrip_note: All 270 tensors reload from disk with correct shapes; int8 largest-tensor mean rel err 0.96%.
runtime: diffusers DDPMPipeline (UNet2D denoiser + DDPM scheduler). Bundle ships quant weights + config.json (UNet arch) + scheduler_config.json.
notes: 'Paints digits' — unconditional MNIST-style digit generation. int8 on-tape 0.99MB beats the ~2MB estimate by half; int4 reaches 0.57MB with bounded denoiser error. Tensorboard events file (2.3MB) excluded as non-payload.
